parameters.body:
=JSON.stringify({ diff: 'Alert: ' + $json.alertname + '
Severity: ' + $json.severity + '
Namespace: ' + $json.namespace + '
Pod: ' + $json.pod + '
Summary: ' + $json.summary + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '
Status: ' + $json.status + '

' + ($json.k8s_context || ''), depth: 'quick', pr_number: 0, commit_sha: '', repo_url: '', branch: '', prompt_type: 'alert-triage' })

assignments.name: message
assignments.value:
=($('Call OpenClaude Triage').item.json.review_text ? ($('Build Alert Message').item.json.severity === 'critical' ? '🔴' : '🟡') + ' ALERT: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.alertname + ' [' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.status + ']

Summary: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.summary + '
Namespace: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.namespace + ($('Build Alert Message').item.json.pod ? '
Pod: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.pod : '') + '

--- AI Triage ---
' + $('Call OpenClaude Triage').item.json.review_text : ($('Build Alert Message').item.json.severity === 'critical' ? '🔴' : '🟡') + ' ALERT: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.alertname + '
Summary: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.summary + '
Namespace: ' + $('Build Alert Message').item.json.namespace)
